opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes swelled shut within an hour, and they are itching so badly I want to tear them out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on fast after I was outside and the itch and swelling are unbearable — I want to be sure it's not something dangerous.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago after being outdoors
symptom_narrative.character: intense itch with watery discharge and puffy lids
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: itch is maddening, eyes feel swollen
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sneezing and a runny nose started at the same time; vision seems okay when I hold my lids open
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: some seasonal allergies before but never this bad

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; symptoms began after time outdoors, windows open at home

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes red, puffy lids, watery (not pus), visible on video
vision seems normal when lids held open
